title: Venjamakoodal
tagline: Venjamakoodal — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Located at Venjamangudalur near Karur, this temple is classified as one of the Kongu Naattu temples.
overview.description: Located at Venjamangudalur near Karur, this temple is classified as one of the Kongu Naattu temples. Karuvoor Aanilai is another Shivastalam located nearby. The sanctum of this temple bears depictions of the 7 Thevara temples in Kongu Naadu.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Arachalur Musical Inscription
topPlaces.description: Arachalur Rock-cut Cave Musical Inscription, also known as Arachalur Isai Kalvettu is a rock cut historical site of musical inscriptions at the south of Nagamalai hill in Arachalur Reserve Forest near Erode in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Arachalur
topPlaces.description: Arachalur is a panchayat town in Erode district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated 22 kilometres from Erode and an important junction on SH 83A en route Erode to Dharapuram and other important small towns like Kodumudi and Chennimalai.

topPlaces.name: Vadugapatti, Erode
topPlaces.description: Vadugapatti is a panchayat town in Erode taluk of Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.

topPlaces.name: Avalpoondurai
topPlaces.description: Avalpoondurai is a panchayat town in Modakurichi taluk of Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.

topPlaces.name: Goundampalayam, Erode
topPlaces.description: Goundampalayam (also spelled Kavundampalayam or Koundampalayam) is a small village under the panchayat town of Chennimalai in Erode district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Vellode Bird Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Vellode Birds Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary located in Erode District, Tamil Nadu, India. The sanctuary covers an area of .77 km2 (0.30 mi2).

topPlaces.name: Kollankoil
topPlaces.description: Kollankoil is a panchayat town in Kodumudi taluk of Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.

topPlaces.name: Chennimalai
topPlaces.description: Chennimalai is a town in Erode district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated away from Erode of about 28kms., Chenni which means Chief and Malai means Hill.

items.note: Arachalur Rock-cut Cave Musical Inscription, also known as Arachalur Isai Kalvettu is a rock cut historical site of musical inscriptions at the south of Nagamalai hill in Arachalur Reserve Forest near Erode in Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Venjamakoodal?
faq.a: The best time to visit Venjamakoodal is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (72 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (81 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Venjamakoodal?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Venjamakoodal at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Venjamakoodal?
faq.a: Stays in Venjamakoodal start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Venjamakoodal?
faq.a: The top attractions are Arachalur Musical Inscription, Arachalur, Vadugapatti, Erode, Avalpoondurai, Goundampalayam, Erode.
